SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.controller.game

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.game.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
BrickMovementListener, GameControlListener, InputEventListener
public class GameController extends Object implements InputEventListener
Central game flow controller coordinating board logic and state transitions. Delegates input events to game session, manages lifecycle, and coordinates between GUI controller and game session.
Author:
Dong, Jia

    • GameController

    • onDownEvent

      public DownData onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Handles the DOWN event from the GUI.
      Specified by:
      onDownEvent in interface BrickMovementListener
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      down data containing view and row-clearing information

      Handles the LEFT event from the GUI.
      Specified by:
      onLeftEvent in interface BrickMovementListener
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing type and source
      Returns:
      view data containing updated brick position and shape
